CustomField.description: This was added as per CCB decision 12/4/2014: The purpose of this email is to capture generic non-Contact specific emails such as infor@familylife.com
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter only email addresses that are genric in nature, not tied to a specific Contact. An example would be info@familylife.com. If the email goes to a specific person, then it should be entered under the Contact's record.
CustomField.label: Generic Non-Personal Email
